Introduction to Hale County

Arrows in Hale County

Arrow #56: Plainview

More Details for Arrow #56

Coordinates: 34.1809118, -101.7153328

Installed: June 6, 2013

Dedicated: July 4, 2013

Marker Text:

Quanah Parker and the Comanches frequented Running Water Draw and the hackberry grove nearby

Get Directions via Google Maps

No image available for this arrow.

Arrow #57: Abernathy

More Details for Arrow #57

Coordinates: 33.8312937, -101.8429482

Installed: June 6, 2013

Dedicated: July 4, 2013

Marker Text:

The Comanches and other tribes traveled Blackwater Draw, 3 miles west of Abernathy, through 1874

Get Directions via Google Maps

No image available for this arrow.

Welcome to the Quanah Parker Trail!

Explore the historical arrow markers commemorating Quanah Parker and the Comanche people across the Texas Plains Trail Region. Use the map on the homepage or navigate via the menu to learn more about this effort.
